g.text: Balance the forces to keep the nose straight.

span.style: background-color: #ef4444; color: white; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 15px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase;

div.p: As the engine forces the main rotor to spin (the Action), an equal and opposite force is applied to the helicopter's body (the Reaction). Without a tail rotor to push sideways and create "Anti-torque," the fuselage would spin uncontrollably in the opposite direction of the blades.
